scenarios.title: "No homo" joke hurts gay classmate
scenarios.summary: A 12-year-old uses "no homo" joke banter with friends; the new kid (who turns out to be gay) walks away visibly upset.

scenarios.title: Left-wing stepmom indoctrinating children
scenarios.summary: A democratic-socialist stepmom dresses a 9-year-old in political slogans, takes her to rallies, and pushes atheism over the child's Catholic upbringing.

scenarios.title: Voting for Obama based on race alone
scenarios.summary: The narrator voted for Obama in 2008 purely for the historic symbolism of a Black president, without understanding his policies, and has abstained from voting since out of regret.

scenarios.title: Girlfriend calls Black friend "boy"
scenarios.summary: The narrator's white girlfriend casually calls their Black friend "boy"; she dismisses concerns about the term's racist history as overreaction.
